form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign won by 2.5 len this track September 17 over 1500m defeating Flush Draw carrying 55kg at $1.50. Previous preparation first-up favourite; to post a big 7 len win. This track July 18 over 1400m defeating Tsukino Megami with 55kg at $1.80. Can go on to better things this campaign.
